text: Alphabet is approaching its Q4 2025 earnings release with heightened investor attention on AI and Cloud momentum. According to SeekingAlpha, market participants are evaluating whether AI-driven growth across Cloud, Search, and YouTube can sustain the company's approximately $4 trillion valuation. Visible Alpha consensus expectations for Q4 2025 total revenues have been revised upward, reflecting growing confidence in the company's performance trajectory. Wall Street sentiment has been mixed ahead of the earnings announcement, with investors rotating between AI-focused technology names and safer investments following sector-wide volatility.
